subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen is bewildered as to what it should recount, for every party among the parties claimeth to seek after truth, whilst dwelling in cloisters and sanctuaries [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی متحیر که چه ذکر نماید هر حزبی از احزاب طلب حق مینمایند و در صوامع و
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
